projectDescription: A TypeScript SDK for building 3D architectural editors with React Three Fiber and WebGPU
keyFeatures: 3D building editor with React Three Fiber and WebGPU rendering
Node-based scene graph with hierarchical relationships (Site → Building → Level → Walls/Slabs/Zones)
Real-time geometry generation with CSG operations for walls, doors, and windows
Zustand state management with undo/redo and IndexedDB persistence
Event-driven architecture with typed event bus for inter-component communication
Spatial grid manager for collision detection and placement validation
Modular system architecture for custom geometry and behavior extensions
publicApiSurface: useScene - Scene state store with CRUD operations for nodes
useViewer - Viewer state store for selection and display modes
sceneRegistry - Registry mapping node IDs to Three.js objects
useRegistry - Hook for registering 3D objects with the scene registry
spatialGridManager - Collision detection and placement validation
emitter - Typed event bus for node interactions
WallSystem - Wall geometry generation with mitering and CSG cutouts
SlabSystem - Floor geometry generation from polygons
ItemSystem - Item positioning on walls, ceilings, and floors
Node schemas (BaseNode, SiteNode, BuildingNode, LevelNode, WallNode, SlabNode, ZoneNode, ItemNode)
